name: Green Pea Phyllo Purses
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peas between several layers of kitchen towels to absorb excess liquid.
2. Pulse peas in a food processor until reduced to a coarse pulp and combine with oil, peppers, ginger, lemon juice, and honey in a large skillet. Cook over moderate heat for 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in the herbs. Let cool.
3. Divide mixture into 24 portions.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F. Cut phyllo sheets in half lengthwise and fourths crosswise, forming 80 squares measuring approximately 6 inches by 4 inches.
5. Cover phyllo with a slightly damp towel. Lay one square on waxed paper. Spray it with olive oil.
6. Repeat with two more squares. Place a portion of the filling in the center.
7. Bring up the opposite corners of the phyllo, crimp firmly and twist the ends to form purses, each with a pointed top.
8. Repeat with remaining phyllo.
9. Spray baking sheets with oil. Transfer pastries to sheet and bake until golden brown, 20 to 25 minutes. Serve immediately.
